description: An interactive p5.js simulation showing living things in a meadow scene for Grade 1 students. Features a sunny sky with animated clouds, three interactive animals (a rabbit, butterfly, and bird), and various plants (flowers and a tree). Students can click on animals to make them move - the rabbit hops, the butterfly flies in patterns, and the bird soars through the sky. The scene includes a sky gradient, sun with animated rays, drifting clouds, grass, and soil. This simulation teaches young students about living things through playful interaction and colorful visuals.
